heading: Omitted
label: 209a, 209b Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 209a, , , which related to number of regular commissioned nurses to be appointed, their grades, and their length of service for purposes of pay and pay periods, was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts.act Dec. 22, 1944, ch. 660, title I58 Stat. 856Section 209b, , , which authorized appointment of fifty additional regular commissioned officers of which twenty-four were to be in grades above that of senior assistant, was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts.act Dec. 22, 1944, ch. 660, title I58 Stat. 857
amendments: CodificationSection 209a, , , which related to number of regular commissioned nurses to be appointed, their grades, and their length of service for purposes of pay and pay periods, was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts.act Dec. 22, 1944, ch. 660, title I58 Stat. 856Section 209b, , , which authorized appointment of fifty additional regular commissioned officers of which twenty-four were to be in grades above that of senior assistant, was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts.act Dec. 22, 1944, ch. 660, title I58 Stat. 857
